title: The Class President Was... Getting a Different Kind of Rush Hour Squeeze
overview: Even as he tries to keep the student council president out of trouble, Vice President Chiga-kun finds himself being drawn to the president's strength and power. Chiga-kun wonders how he, being such an intelligent individual, can be so unwillingly taken with a boy who is so country and simple...

title: I Spend the Night with... the Class President
